patterns.hint: The wrappers read content from synced resource dirs, not directly from content/. Run scripts/sync-content.sh before build/test/publish so jvm-wrapper/src/main/resources/domain-pack/ and python-wrapper/src/domain_pack/data/ are populated.

patterns.match: manifest version.*does not match tag|manifest version.*!=.*tag
patterns.hint: Architecture violation: content/manifest.yaml is the single source of truth for the version. Bump it BEFORE tagging, never the other way around. The publish workflow's preflight job aborts on mismatch — fix the manifest, retag with the matching version.
Provider/manifest violation: do not hardcode version in build.gradle.kts or pyproject.toml. Both wrappers must read version from ../content/manifest.yaml so a single bump flows everywhere.
Content rule: every <termEntry id="..."> must be unique. Consumers may pin to an entry's id, so reusing one is a silent breakage. Pick a fresh t-NNNN.
Architecture violation: JVM and Python loader public APIs must mirror each other. If you added a method on one side, add it on the other before merging. See PROJECT.md #Architecture Rules.
Schema violation: content/data.tbx must validate against TBX 3.0. Run `xmllint --noout content/data.tbx` locally before committing — the CI workflow pack-content.yml gates merge on this check.

License separation violation: the data license (LICENSE-DATA + manifest.licenses.data) is independent of the wrapper code license (manifest.licenses.code). Both must be declared explicitly in manifest.yaml. Wrapper code must not inherit data license, and vice versa.
Single-source-of-truth violation: never edit synced copies under wrapper resource dirs. Edit content/ and re-run scripts/sync-content.sh. The synced copies are regenerated and your edit will be lost.

Maven Central requires GPG-signed artifacts. Set SIGNING_KEY and SIGNING_PASSWORD environment variables (or GitHub Secrets) before publishing. The signing block in build.gradle.kts is gated on these env vars and is a no-op without them — useful for local builds but blocks Central publish.
